prerequisites.value: Wis 15, Improved Unarmed Strike, Wolf Style, Knowledge (nature) 6 ranks.

description.value: **Benefit:** While using Wolf Style, you gain a +2 bonus when you attempt a trip combat maneuver as part of an attack of opportunity. Whenever you successfully trip a creature, as a free action you can choose an available space that is both adjacent to you and the creature’s original space for the tripped creature to land prone in.
